Item 1A. Risk Factors

The following risk factor updates supplement the risk factors disclosed in our most recent annual report on Form 10-K filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

Intense competition in the cloud computing market from established and emerging providers could adversely affect our pricing, market share, and margins for Azure and related services.

Our business depends on maintaining trust with enterprise customers, and any significant security incident or data breach could materially harm our reputation and result in financial liability.

Constraints in the global supply of specialized artificial intelligence accelerator chips, including graphics processing units, may limit our capacity to expand cloud infrastructure in response to customer demand.

Item 2. Management's Discussion
